name: Vault RAG
description: Hybrid retrieval and answer generation for Markdown notes stored in an Obsidian-style vault.
system_prompt: This workspace contains Vault RAG. It ingests Markdown notes from input/Vault 14, stores OpenRouter-generated embeddings in ChromaDB, combines semantic retrieval with BM25 keyword search, optionally reranks results through OpenRouter, and exposes both CLI and Streamlit interfaces.

groups.name: Core
groups.system_prompt:
Core retrieval pipeline for Vault RAG.

${group_files}

build-database-cli.description: CLI entrypoint for indexing Markdown notes from the vault into ChromaDB.

database-builder.description: Collection management and BM25 rebuild logic for the indexed notes.

vault-ingestion.description: Markdown note loader with frontmatter parsing and date inference.

openrouter-client.description: OpenRouter-backed embedding, reranking, and chat client.

searcher.description: Hybrid search, score fusion, reranking, and recency logic.

ask-question-cli.description: CLI query interface for the indexed vault.

streamlit-ui.description: Multi-page Streamlit app for search, notes, and answers.

utils.description: Hashing, tokenization, stopword, and pretty-print helpers.
